title: Resolution Authorizing the Honorable Municipal Mayor Antonio L. Kalaw to Enter and Sign Into an Agreement / Deed of Sale in Behalf of the Municipal Government of Los Baños for the Acquisition of Three Parcels of Land Covering a Total Area of One Thousand Four Hundred and Forty-one Square Meters (1,441 SQ.M) Located at Barangay Malinta, Los Baños, Laguna for the Proposed Malinta Elementary School Extension. (AUTHOR: GERONIMO A. CICERON, 02/08/2021)
